0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"API Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne exposes multiple interfaces: Python SDK, Hermes plugin tools, and REST API."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Interface Comparison"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Interface | Best For | Latency | Setup |\n|-----------|----------|---------|-------|\n| Python SDK | Direct integration, scripts | Lowest | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," |\n| Hermes Plugin | Agent frameworks | Low | Plugin config |\n| REST API | Remote services, microservices | Medium | Server start |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Python SDK"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The primary interface for Python applications:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory()\nmem.remember(\"User prefers dark mode.\")\nresults = mem.recall(\"user preferences\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Hermes Plugin"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"First-class integration with the Hermes agent framework:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# hermes.yaml\nplugins:\n- name: mnemosyne\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    auto_context: true\n","language":"yaml"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"REST API"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Start the server:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.server --port 8080\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Example request:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/remember -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d '{\"content\": \"User prefers dark mode.\", \"tags\": [\"preferences\"]}'\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Authentication"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Interface | Auth Method |\n|-----------|-------------|\n| Python SDK | None (local) |\n| Hermes Plugin | Via Hermes auth |\n| REST API | API key header (",["$","code",null,{"children":"X-API-Key"}],") |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Rate Limits"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Interface | Default Limit |\n|-----------|---------------|\n| Python SDK | Unlimited (local) |\n| Hermes Plugin | Unlimited |\n| REST API | 1000 req/min |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Error Handling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"All interfaces return consistent error structures:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"{\n  \"error\": {\n      \"code\": \"MEMORY_NOT_FOUND\",\n      \"message\": \"Memory ID mem_abc123 does not exist.\",\n      \"status\": 404,\n  }\n}\n","language":"json"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout
